title: claude-db Finding
description: A single database audit finding. Falsifiability-first: every finding must be independently observable (evidence.observed, verbatim, with secrets redacted) and re-checkable (verification.reproduce). Impact is banded + confidence-tagged, never a fabricated percentage. needs_api is NEVER a silent pass.

module.description: Owning module id M0..M22 (M0 = engine-selection recommendation, never scored). Sub-module letters allowed (e.g. M20a vector); the scorer maps to the parent.

status.description: needs_api means the check needs a live DB / Tier-1+ to verify — it is NEVER a silent pass.

severity.description: 1 = cosmetic, 5 = can cap the score (e.g. no primary key, plaintext secrets, destructive irreversible migration). 0 is reserved for not_applicable (excluded from scoring).

evidence.description: The OBSERVED fact — verbatim DDL/migration/query, with credentials redacted.

fixable.description: auto = deterministic/additive/verifiable write (e.g. CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY); proposed = draft requiring per-item accept; advisory = never written by the tool.

fix_preview.description: Unified diff, new-file content, or migration SQL. Present when fixable is auto/proposed.

verification.description: How to confirm this finding independently. reproduce MUST be runnable; reference live connections via $DATABASE_URL, never a literal credential.

expected_impact.description: Honest, banded impact. NO naked percentages — published numbers may appear only inside rationale with a citation.

axis.description: Which score(s) this finding feeds: Design & Integrity, Performance & Scale, or both.

confidence.description: established = durable fact or Tier-1/2-backed (can cap); directional = strong static signal; speculative = inference without live data — NEVER caps a score.
